Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Ocean Transport Corporation
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#68408.
Michael E. Fox, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MARION CHAPPELLE, as wrongful Death Heir, and
as Successor - in Interest to BENJAMIN R. CHAPPELLE, deceased; and BENJAMIN A. CHAPPELLE,
as Legal Heirs of BENJAMIN R. CHAPPELLE, deceased ("plaintiffs").
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-
up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant OCEAN TRANSPORT CORPORATION.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against
Defaulted Defendant as follows:
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from
defendant OCEAN TRANSPORT CORPORATION, in the amount of:

For MARION CHAPPELLE, as Successor-in-Interest to BENJAMIN R. CHAPPELLE, deceased, $3362.00
in Economic Damages,
For MARION CHAPPELLE, as wrongful Death Heir of BENJAMIN R. CHAPPELLE, deceased
$500,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
For Benjamin A. Chappelle, as wrongful Death Heir, of BENJAMIN R. CHAPPELLE, deceased
$200,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
Total Judgment of $703,362.00.

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
